fields.description: The workbook (BOQs) this priced cell belongs to. Denormalized (mirrors BOQ Nodes / BoQ Committed Sheet Grid) so the layer is filterable by BoQ.
fields.label: BoQ

fields.description: The committed sheet name, stored VERBATIM (#152 -- never stripped/trimmed). Part of the durable Excel-address identity (survives a re-commit).
fields.label: Sheet Name

fields.description: The source Excel row number of the priced cell (= BOQ Nodes.source_row_number = the committed grid row_number). Durable identity component.
fields.label: Excel Row

fields.description: The Excel column letter of the priced cell (e.g. 'E'). Derived from BoQ Sheet.column_role_map by (role, area) -> letter; NOT stored on the node, so persisted here. Durable identity component.
fields.label: Column Letter

fields.description: The committed-tier commit_version of the sheet this price prices (BoQ Sheet / BOQ Nodes / grid share one commit_version per (boq, sheet)). Pricing is anchored to a committed version; identity component.
fields.label: Committed Version

fields.description: A SETTABLE per-version pointer to the committed BOQ Nodes row this cell prices (re-resolvable from the Excel address + committed version). A convenience reference, NOT part of the identity key (node names change on re-commit).
fields.label: Node

fields.description: The area name (BOQ Node Qty By Area.area_name) for a multi-area cell, else blank. Disambiguates which per-area rate column this cell is, alongside col_letter.
fields.label: Area

fields.description: The rate kind this cell carries: supply / install / combined (the column_role_map rate role's kind). Semantic, not part of the key (col_letter already pins the physical cell).
fields.label: Rate Kind

fields.description: A copy of the committed row's description at pricing time -- a copy-forward MATCH GUARD (later slices warn when the committed description changed under a price). NOT part of the unique key.
fields.label: Description (guard)

fields.description: The rate the user filled into this committed Excel cell.
fields.label: Rate

fields.description: The pricing layer's OWN filled-state. Committed node rates read 0.0 (Currency coerces unset -> 0.0), so the node cannot be null-checked for 'is this priced' -- this flag is the source of truth.
fields.label: Is Filled

fields.description: Per-(boq, sheet_name, excel_row, col_letter, committed_version) pricing version. Incremented on re-save by the pricing write path (freeze-and-supersede, mirroring the committed tier). Distinct from committed_version (the version of the data being priced).
fields.label: Pricing Version

fields.description: Exactly one current pricing record per (boq, sheet_name, excel_row, col_letter, committed_version). The one-current invariant is enforced by the pricing write path (pricing.py), NOT in this controller (mirrors the committed-tier convention).
fields.label: Is Current

fields.description: When this pricing record was written. Set by the pricing write path.
fields.label: Priced At

fields.description: The finalize-pricing lock for this committed version. When set, the pricing for this cell is finalized (a later finalize-pricing slice enforces the lock semantics; this slice only declares the marker).
fields.label: Is Finalized
